content:
# elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic Daily Update (Apr 8, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
There was no direct code development or repository activity for the `plugin-anthropic` codebase on April 8, 2026. Community discussion remained focused on broader architectural challenges regarding inter-agent coordination and trust verification.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS
*   **No code changes were implemented in this repository during this period.**

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   None.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None.

## NEW ISSUES
*   None.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   **[#6514](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/issues/6514) Inter-Agent Coordination: Have you considered cross-instance communication?**
    *   The discussion continued regarding how independent AI agents can establish trust and coordinate tasks across different sessions and instances.
    *   A new contribution from 64R3N proposed using "behavioral history" as a complement to wallet-based credentials. This involves using an append-only on-chain attestation sequence (via WTRMRK) to verify the depth and recency of an agent's operational history.
    *   Participants emphasized that combining wallet-based trust (what an agent holds) with behavioral sequences (how long an agent has reliably operated) helps solve the "cold-start" problem for cross-instance identity and peer-to-peer coordination.
